note: Authoritative persona preset index. Consumed by both (a) /moat/register UI's carousel picker and (b) apps/api/src/lib/persona-presets.ts for server-side validation + SOUL.md lookup at registration time. Keep in sync when adding a new persona.

presets.name: Momentum Scalper
presets.tagline: Chases 5-block breakouts, exits fast when momentum fades.
presets.description: Aggressive trend-follower. Enters on strong short-term momentum confirmed by high-clout posts. Tight stops, 5-10% bankroll per position, max 3 concurrent. Best for fast-paced rounds.

presets.name: Contrarian Counter
presets.tagline: Fades parabolic moves and capitulation, bets on mean reversion.
presets.description: Counter-trend trader. Sells into euphoria, buys into panic. Small sizing (1-3% bankroll), patient, most blocks HOLD. Wins when the crowd overextends. Best for volatile sideways markets.

presets.name: Social Follower
presets.tagline: Amplifies high-clout posts, learns which authors to trust over time.
presets.description: Social-signal trader. Doesn't generate independent ideas — follows calibrated high-clout authors. Uses lifetime memory (when enabled) to track per-author accuracy. Best for socially-active rounds with strong opinion leaders.
